code_diff.when: showing a real before/after change to code or config

code_typing.when: a command or snippet being typed in a terminal

code_workbench.when: a full VS Code file view of the code being discussed

code_morph.when: one snippet transforming into another (Shiki magic-move)

notes: Cutaway blocks are installed via `hyperframes add`, data-patched with the real code from the transcript/screen, recoloured to the identity ground, and rendered full-frame opaque. Overlay scenes are bespoke IDE panels (see identity.css).
